info.title: Deal Contact Roles
info.description: API for managing contact roles in Deal records. Track and manage which contacts are associated with deals and their specific roles (e.g., Decision Maker, Influencer). Supports full CRUD operations to maintain accurate relationship data between contacts and deal opportunities.

get.description: Retrieve contact roles associated with a deal

200.description: Successfully retrieved contact roles associated with the deal

schema.description: Response containing contact roles data and pagination info

data.description: Array of contact role records with fields specified in the query parameter

items.description: Contact role record with dynamic fields based on the 'fields' query parameter

Owner.description: Owner information for the contact role

next_page_token.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results

count.description: Number of records in the current response

previous_page_token.description: Token for retrieving the previous page of results

more_records.description: Indicates if more records are available

204.description: No content - No contact roles found for the specified deal

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data, invalid module, field limit exceeded, or required parameter missing

schema.description: Error response for a bad request, which can be one of several specific error types.

403.description: Forbidden - No permission to access deals or contacts

schema.description: Error response for when the user lacks permission to access deals or contacts.

put.summary: Add Or Update Contact Role Relations
put.description: Add contact roles to a deal or update existing contact role relations in bulk

200.description: Successfully added or updated the specified contact role relations

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data, invalid module, field limit exceeded, or required parameter missing

schema.description: Error response for a bad request, which can be one of several specific error types.

403.description: Forbidden - No permission to access deals or contacts

schema.description: Error response for when the user lacks permission to access deals or contacts.

delete.description: Remove one or more contact role associations from a deal using their relation IDs

200.description: Successfully removed the specified contact role relations

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data, invalid module, field limit exceeded, or required parameter missing

schema.description: Error response for a bad request, which can be one of several specific error types.

403.description: Forbidden - No permission to access deals or contacts

schema.description: Error response for when the user lacks permission to access deals or contacts.

get.description: Retrieve the contact role relation for a specific contact associated with a deal.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the contact role relation for the given contact

schema.description: Response containing the contact role relation for the specified contact

data.description: Array containing the contact role record for the specified contact

items.description: Contact role record with dynamic fields based on the 'fields' query parameter

Owner.description: Owner information for the contact role

204.description: No contact role relation exists for the specified contact on this deal

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data, invalid module, field limit exceeded, or required parameter missing

schema.description: Error response for a bad request, which can be one of several specific error types.

403.description: Forbidden - No permission to access deals or contacts

schema.description: Error response for when the user lacks permission to access deals or contacts.

put.description: Assign or update a contact role for a specific contact on a deal.

schema.description: Payload containing the contact role assignment to apply

items.description: Contact role configuration for the specified contact

id.description: Unique identifier of the contact role

200.description: Successfully associated the contact role with the deal

schema.description: Result of updating the contact role relation

data.description: Status entries for the processed contact relation

items.description: Operation result for the contact relation

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data, invalid module, field limit exceeded, or required parameter missing

schema.description: Error response for a bad request, which can be one of several specific error types.

403.description: Forbidden - No permission to access deals or contacts

schema.description: Error response for when the user lacks permission to access deals or contacts.

delete.description: Remove a specific contact-deal relation using the contact identifier in the path.

200.description: Successfully removed the specified contact relation

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid data, invalid module, field limit exceeded, or required parameter missing

schema.description: Error response for a bad request, which can be one of several specific error types.

403.description: Forbidden - No permission to access deals or contacts

schema.description: Error response for when the user lacks permission to access deals or contacts.

code.description: Error code indicating invalid deal ID

details.description: Error details containing the path index

resource_path_index.description: Index of the path parameter that is invalid (1 for deal ID)

message.description: Error message indicating the deal ID is invalid
message.const: the related id given seems to be invalid

code.description: Error code indicating invalid module name

details.description: Error details containing the path index

resource_path_index.description: Index of the path parameter that is invalid (0 for module)

message.description: Error message indicating the module name is invalid
message.const: the module name given seems to be invalid

code.description: Error code indicating invalid relation name

details.description: Error details containing the path index

resource_path_index.description: Index of the path parameter that is invalid (2 for relation name)

message.description: Error message indicating the relation name is invalid
message.const: the relation name given seems to be invalid

code.description: Error code indicating a required parameter is missing

details.description: Error details containing the missing parameter name

param_name.description: Name of the missing required parameter

message.description: Error message indicating a parameter is missing
message.const: One of the expected parameter is missing

code.description: Error code indicating lack of permission

permissions.description: List of required permissions that are missing

code.description: Error code indicating lack of permission

permissions.description: List of required permissions that are missing

DeleteRelationsSuccessResponse.description: Response returned after deleting contact role relations

data.description: Status entries for each deleted relation

items.description: Result for a single relation delete operation

UpsertRelationsRequest.description: Payload for adding or updating contact role relations on a deal

data.description: List of contact role relations to upsert

Contact_Role.description: Contact role to associate with the relation

id.description: Identifier of the contact relation for the deal

UpsertRelationsSuccessResponse.description: Response returned after adding or updating contact role relations

data.description: Status entries for each processed relation

items.description: Result for processing a single relation

message.description: Result message describing the action performed

schema.description: Internal server error response object containing code, message, details, and status.

code.description: Error code indicating the type of error.

Module.name: module
Module.description: The module name for the deal record

DealId.name: dealId
DealId.description: The unique identifier of the deal record

Contact.name: contactId
Contact.description: The unique identifier of the contact record

Ids.name: ids
Ids.description: Comma-separated list of contact role relation IDs to delete

Fields.name: fields
Fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names to include in the response. Field names must follow API naming conventions.

the relation name given seems to be invalid
